user.title: Set up LogiLink PDU8P01
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PDU.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the PDU. Check the IP address and credentials.

reload_config.name: Reload configuration
reload_config.description: Reloads the outlet names and delay times directly from the PDU.

restart_outlet.name: Restart outlet
restart_outlet.description: Briefly turns an outlet off and back on (or just on).
